title: KAHEIGN Christmas Tree Topper, 25CM Large Red Xmas Tree Top Hat with Elf Legs and Striped Bow Ribbon for Home Christmas Holiday Winter Party Decor Desktop Ornaments
features: [High quality] Made of high quality felt and silk, soft and smooth, not easy to fade, solid metal frame inside, sturdy and durable, not easy to deform and braek, can be used for a long time
[Tree topper] Designed with red, white and green ribbon bows, and decorated with cute elf legs ornaments, there are also velvet cloth on the red hat, can make the tree look more attractive
[Easy to uset] Just place it on top of the Christmas tree, the hat is collapsible and contains metal spring to support the shape of the hat, can fold the hat and store it in the box
[Size] Diameter: 25cm, heigth: 23cm, ribbon length: 30cm, suitable for most Christmas trees, if the branch length of the tree is not long enough to support the hat, you may need to fill it up
[Applicable] Perfect for decorating the Christmas tree, or decorating as a snowman hat, and can also display the hat as a holiday table centerpiece in your room, kitchen, desk, office, fireplace etc
description: KAHEIGN 25CM Large Red Christmas Tree Topper are perfect for decorating the Christmas tree, or decorating as a snowman hat, and can also display the hat as a holiday table centerpiece in your room, kitchen, desk, office, fireplace etc! Feature: - Made of high quality felt and silk, soft and smooth, not easy to fade, solid metal frame inside, not easy to deform and braek. - Designed with red, white and green ribbon bows, and decorated with cute elf legs ornaments, there are also velvet cloth on the red hat. - Just place it on top of the Christmas tree, The hat is collapsible and contains metal spring to support the shape of the hat. - Suitable for most Christmas trees, if the branch length of the tree is not long enough to support the hat, you may need to fill it up. Specification: Material: Felt and silk Color: Red, white and green Size: 25cm x 23cm Ribbon length: 30cm Package included: 1 x Christmas Tree Topper
